business_description.nature_of_business: Boutique hotel ownership and management with integrated restaurant and event operations across Central and South Texas

coverages_discussed.notes: Prior policy for 2024 term had 11 claims.

positives: Fire alarms hard-wired with central station monitoring
Written contracts with indemnification required from all contractors
concerns: OSHA citations in the past 3 years
No quality control / quality assurance program
No cyber liability protections in place
Plumbing and electrical systems are original (2005)
Building not fully sprinklered per NFPA 13 or 13R
Prior policy cancellation in 2022 (Zurich Insurance Group)
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: 11 claims in 2024 (Travelers), 3 claims in 2023 (Markel), and 6 claims in 2022 (Zurich).

extracted_text_sections.executive_summary: Boutique hotel ownership and management with integrated restaurant and event operations across Central and South Texas.
extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Hours of Operation: Mon-Fri 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM. 8 locations across Austin, San Antonio, and Fredericksburg, TX consisting of Hotels, Restaurants, and an Office. Short term rentals permitted. 90% regular occupancy.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: Formal safety program: Yes. Written contracts with all subcontractors: Yes. Indemnification required from contractors: Yes. Quality control program: No.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Loss history shows 11 claims in 2024, 3 claims in 2023, and 6 claims in 2022 with a previous cancellation by Zurich Insurance Group in 2022.
